title: mangifera indica var. domestica
intro: Mangifera indica var. domestica, also known as the Indian mango or domestic mango, is a variety of the mango plant (Mangifera indica) native to South Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the Indian mango include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes, as well as aiding in weight management and improving digestion. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
